title: Imperial pilot (disambiguation)
content:
'''Imperial pilot''' may refer to:

==Canon==
*[[Imperial Starfighter Pilot]] — pilots that flew [[TIE/ln space superiority starfighter]]s for the [[Galactic Empire]].

==Legends==
*[[Imperial pilot (Sith Empire)|Imperial pilots]] — pilots of the [[Sith Empire (Post–Great Hyperspace War)|reconstituted Sith Empire]].
*[[TIE pilot]]s — pilots that flew [[TIE/LN starfighter]]s for the [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Galactic Empire]]. Notable examples include [[Soontir Fel/Legends|Soontir Fel]] and [[Tycho Celchu/Legends|Tycho Celchu]].
*Shuttle pilots — pilots who flew shuttles like the [[Lambda-class T-4a shuttle/Legends|''Lambda''-class T-4a shuttle]] for the [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Galactic Empire]].
*[[Vehicle Command Crewer]]s — pilots of land vehicles such as [[All Terrain Armored Transport/Legends|AT-ATs]] for the [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Galactic Empire]].
{{Disambig}}
